review_markdown:
## Review — implementation plan (round 1)

The structure is sound and the work breakdown is mostly buildable, but two gaps would force the implementer to improvise decisions the plan should make.

**Blocking**
- **B1 (atomic writes):** the store is written in place; a crash mid-write corrupts all todos. Write to a temp file and `os.replace()`.
- **B2 (error responses):** 404/400 behavior is undefined, so the build will invent it. Specify the error envelope and status codes.

**Non-blocking**
- N1: consider noting pagination as a future concern for the list endpoint.
summary: Solid structure, but two gaps block a clean build: durability of the on-disk store under concurrent writes, and unspecified error responses.

blocking_issues.title: Disk store has no atomic-write guarantee
blocking_issues.detail: The plan writes the JSON store in place; a crash mid-write corrupts all todos.
blocking_issues.suggested_fix: Write to a temp file and os.replace() onto the target so writes are atomic.

blocking_issues.title: Error responses unspecified
blocking_issues.detail: 404 for missing todo and 400 for invalid body are not defined, so the build will improvise them.
blocking_issues.suggested_fix: Define the error envelope and status codes for not-found and validation failures.

non_blocking_suggestions.title: Consider pagination
non_blocking_suggestions.detail: List endpoint may grow; note it as a future concern.
